🔄 Content updated (published: June 19, 2026)

【Registration has closed】

Enjoy music at the Citizen Activity Center!

Date and time: Sunday, July 5, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 2:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m.

Location: Hanno City Citizen Activity Center, Multipurpose Hall

Performers: Bell Époque

Program: Flute and piano ensemble

Capacity: 80 people

A Tanabata (Star Festival) exhibition will be held from Friday, June 26 through Tuesday, July 7, 2026. Please stop by!

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/11274.html
